mapper.sql: id, name, category, price, stock, image_url AS imageUrl, description, deleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM product
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, category, price, stock, image_url, description, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, 0, datetime('now','localtime'), datetime('now','localtime'))
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, update_time = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET deleted = 1, update_time = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, update_time = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop_order o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = #{productId} AND o.status IN ('PENDING', 'SHIPPED')
